name: Global X Lithium & Battery Tech ETF
name_clean: Global X Lithium Battery Tech ETF
description: The Global X Lithium & Battery Tech ETF (LIT) seeks to provide investment results that correspond generally to the price and yield performance, before fees and expenses, of the Solactive Global Lithium Index. The fund invests in the full lithium cycle, from mining and refining the metal through battery production. It provides exposure to companies involved in lithium mining, lithium refining, and battery manufacturing, which are essential components for the growing electric vehicle market and renewable energy storage solutions.
